user.title: Fuel Finder API and Search Setup
user.description: Choose how to set your search location and enter your Fuel Finder API credentials. You can create your Client ID and Client Secret via the UK Government Fuel Finder guidance: https://www.gov.uk/guidance/access-fuel-price-data

data.search_method: How would you like to set your search area?

location_map.title: Configure Fuel Prices UK - Map
location_map.description: Monitor fuel prices at stations near you. This integration uses official UK government fuel price data to find the cheapest prices within your specified radius.

data_description.update_interval: How often to check for updated fuel prices (minimum 5 minutes)
data_description.location: Your location for finding nearby fuel stations
data_description.radius: Maximum distance to search for fuel stations (0.5 to 31 miles)
data_description.fuel_types: Which fuel types to track prices for
data_description.cheapest_count: How many ranked cheapest stations to expose per fuel type

location_address.title: Configure Fuel Prices UK - Address
location_address.description: Enter a UK postcode, address, or location name. We'll find the coordinates for you.

data_description.update_interval: How often to check for updated fuel prices (minimum 5 minutes)
data_description.address: UK postcode (e.g. SW1A 1AA), full address, or location name
data_description.radius: Maximum distance to search for fuel stations (0.5 to 31 miles)
data_description.fuel_types: Which fuel types to track prices for
data_description.cheapest_count: How many ranked cheapest stations to expose per fuel type

error.invalid_radius: Radius must be between 0.5 and 31 miles
error.invalid_update_interval: Update interval must be at least 300 seconds (5 minutes)
error.invalid_api_credentials: Fuel Finder API credentials are invalid. Check your Client ID and Client Secret.
error.no_fuel_type_selected: Please select at least one fuel type to monitor
error.invalid_address: Could not find location. Please check your postcode/address and try again.
error.invalid_location: Please drop a pin on the map before continuing

error.invalid_radius: Radius must be between 0.5 and 31 miles
error.invalid_update_interval: Update interval must be at least 300 seconds (5 minutes)
error.invalid_api_credentials: Fuel Finder API credentials are invalid. Check your Client ID and Client Secret.
error.no_fuel_type_selected: Please select at least one fuel type to monitor
error.invalid_address: Could not find location. Please check your postcode/address and try again.
error.invalid_location: Please drop a pin on the map before continuing

init.title: Update Search Method and API Credentials
init.description: Choose how to update your search location and optionally rotate your Fuel Finder API credentials. You can create or manage credentials via: https://www.gov.uk/guidance/access-fuel-price-data

data.search_method: How would you like to set your search area?
data.client_secret: Fuel Finder API Client Secret (leave blank to keep existing)

location_map.title: Update Options - Map
location_map.description: Update your Fuel Prices UK settings

data_description.location: Your location for finding nearby fuel stations

data_description.cheapest_count: How many ranked cheapest stations to expose per fuel type
